titleStmt.title: SII 9.276: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 276. (A.R. No. 257 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE IN MANNERA-MASALAVADA, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (who was long dead by this time) ruling from Kalyāṇa and is dated the 4th year of the Kaḷachurya king Rāyanārāyaṇa Āhavamalladēva, Śōbhakṛit, Jyēshṭha, paurṇami, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1183, June 7 when there was a lunar eclipse. Jagadēkamallā's feudatory Vijaya-Pāṇḍyadēva is stated to have been ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred and Noḷambavāḍi thirty two-thousand. The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vikramādityarasa, together with Rāyarasa and with some Heggaḍes and Gāvuṇḍas, is said to have made a grant confirming the one formerly made, for the service of the god Kalidēva and placed it in charge of a certain Kalyāṇaśakti-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiractuṁbicamdracāmaracāravē traiḷō
kyanagarāraṁbharūpastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ pa
ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajja
gadēkamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . kalyāṇadalnevīḍinelu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁca mahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpu
ravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbarabhramara cūḍāmaṇi . nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa
paricchēdigaṁḍa rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁga śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvapādābjabhriṁga nāmādisa
mastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vijayapāṁḍyadēvaru kōgaḷiya
ynūṟumaṁ noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁdāḷuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samastasujanajanastu
tyanahihayānvayaprasūta sahasrabāhupratāpanayya
ṇāditya sakalavāravanitājanakucakaḷasa kumudakuvaḷa
yabāndhavanāhavadhīra parabaḷasādhaka bappanaṁkakāṟa catussamaya
samuddharaṇa nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēśva
raṁ mosaḷevāḍa hanneraḍumaṁ maṁneya vikramādityarasaṁ su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamire . śrīyaṁ lakṣmīśaṁ
vākśrīyaṁ kamaḷajane yeseva nirmmaḷakīrttiśrīyaṁ gaurīśaṁ Ose
dāyattaṁ māḷke vikramāṁka ninaganavarataṁ . vinayanidhānaneṁdu suja
nāgraṇiyeṁdu vinītaneṁdu sajjananutaneṁdu dīnajanakalpitakalpa
kujātaneṁdu peṇpina kaṇiyeṁdu rūpamakaradhvajanendakhiḷāva
nitaḷaṁ manamosedartthiyiṁ pogaḷutirppudu saṁtata vikramāṁka
na . nuḍiva beḍaṁgu nōḍuva parākrama māḍuva sāhasōkti na
ḍava caritramuṁ hesaru rūpu guṇārnnavaneṁtu nōrppaḍaṁ kaḍugaliya
ppa vikramana gaṁḍinadoṁdu poḍarpanēna baṇnisalaḷavalte toḍardda
ragāḷavīdharege raṁjisidaṁ sujanaikabāṁdhavaṁ . kaliye
nisi negaḷda subhaṭara neleyenisidanāhavāṁgaṇadeḍeyūḷu kulava
nitege manōjanenisida kaliyugadoḷvikramāṁka ninnadoreyarumoḷa
rē . biḍadaḍare poṇaruva vairiyakaḍugāyi piṁdaṭṭi muṭṭi raṇaraṁgada
lkādiyaḍagiṁḍiyāḍi geluvanu poḍaviyalatisubhaṭa vikramāṁkaca
mūpaṁ . birudina Aṁkamāle toḍarikkida kālalu gaṁḍapeṁḍaraṁ karagasagā
ḷaniccaṇige dabbukaveṁbivanikki kādi nittarisade yōḍihōda beḷḷeraḷeya bēṁṭe
yalu kolalu vollade kāvanu vikramabhūbhuja . gaṁḍaragaṁḍanāha
vada gaṁḍanumabbarisuvara gaṁḍa mārkkoḷvara gaṁḍa kūḍitappuva ma(ṁ)nneyara
gaṁḍanu gaṁḍavikramāṁkana kahaḷāravaṁ nuḍiyutirppudu Ājiraṁga
dalu . svasti . śrīmatu kaḷacuryyabhujabaḷacakravartti rāyanārāyaṇayā
havamalladēvavarśada nālkaneya śōbhakritsaṁvatsara jyēṣṭada puṇnami sōma
grahaṇadalu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vikramādityarasaruṁ rāya
rasaruṁ haggaḍeyaiceṇanuṁ heggaḍeya hollaṇanuṁ haḍavaḷa rājaṇanuṁ gauḍa
ra gaṭṭigāvuṁḍanuṁ yi(ṁ)mmaḍigētagāvuṁḍanuṁ sēnebōva duggaṇnanuṁ samastapraje
gaḷa muṁde śrīmūlasthānakalidēvara jīyara kētiseṭṭiyana maga sōsanayya
na maga kalidēvaṁga kalyāṇaśaktipaṁḍitargge yūdēvargge mu(ṁ)nna naḍava bhū
miyaṁ punarddhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi dēvaraṁgabhōganivēdyake dēvariṁ
mūḍaṇa keṟeyoḷagaṇa keyi matta 1 kēśavadēvara keyiṁ mūḍaṇa Oṁma
reyalu yerematta 5 yā keyiṁ teṁkalu hattira Oṁmereyalu haraḷakeyi
matta 1 ka(ṁ)mmaṁ 450 yūrayāra hūṭeyaluṁ grāmaśāntiyaluṁ dēvargge
sahasragaḍuge pūje nivēdyakke yarasaruṁ prajegaḷuṁ yā dēvara ye
reyakeyiṁ teṁkaloṁmereyalu yere matta 1 kaṁ 450 māvinakeṟeya keḷa
ge guttēśvaradēvara gaddeyiṁ baḍaga hattire O(ṁ)mmereyali(ṁ)nnēsaṟalu gadde kaṁmaṁ 100
Antere keṁgāḍu matta 9 gaddekaṁmaṁ 100 yī dharmmavanivara makkaḷa ma(ṁ)mmakkaḷu
thanakavācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salisuvaru mattārānuṁ voḍeyareṁdu baṁdava
ru śivadrōhigaḷu yī dharmmamaṁ pratipālisidavargge śrīgaṁgeyamnevāraṇāsi
kurakṣētradalu sāyira kavileyaṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge
sōmasūryyagrahaṇadalu dānaṁgeydu mahāpuruśanakkuvidanaḷidava
nā tīrtthadalā brāhmaṇaruvanā kavileyuvanaḷida mahāpāpiyaku .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ śaṣṭirvvarśasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . kōṭipayaṁkavileyanekkōṭi tapōdhanara vēdavidaraṁ pannirkkōṭiya
ne kōṭitīrtthade kōṭimahātithiyoḷaḷidavintidanaḷidaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.276 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
